creator: freebsduser@paradisegreen.co.uk
text:
Unfortunately the fix committed at 2011-03-14 13:23:31 UTC is 
insufficient to fix this problem.

You still get the uninitialized constant 
ActiveSupport::Dependencies::Mutex error even with this point-release of 
the redmine port.

The only way I've been able to fix this is to forcibly downgrade the 
rubygems package back to 1.3.7

-- 
Thomas Sandford
